annotator_2.text: Large language models learn statistical associations from massive training corpora and user interactions.
annotator_2.source_quote: Large language models (LLMs) learn statistical associations from massive training corpora and user interactions

annotator_2.text: Deployed LLM systems can surface or infer information about individuals.
annotator_2.source_quote: deployed systems can surface or infer information about individuals

annotator_2.text: People lack practical ways to inspect what a model associates with their name.
annotator_2.source_quote: Yet people lack practical ways to inspect what a model associates with their name.

annotator_2.text: LMP2 is a browser-based self-audit tool.
annotator_2.source_quote: introduce LMP2, a browser-based self-audit tool

annotator_2.text: The study included two user studies with a total of 458 participants.
GPT-4o predicts 11 of 50 features for everyday people with at least 60% accuracy.
annotator_2.source_quote: GPT-4o predicts 11 of 50 features for everyday people with $\ge$60\% accuracy

annotator_2.text: There is clear separation between stable name-conditioned associations and model defaults.

annotator_2.text: When outputs are probabilistic, context-dependent, and user-mediated through elicitation, what model-individual associations even include is under-specified.
annotator_2.source_quote: when outputs are probabilistic, context-dependent, and user-mediated through elicitation, what model--individual associations even include is under-specified

annotator_2.text: Operationalisation of model-individual associations relies on crafting probes and metrics that are hard to validate or compare.

annotator_2.text: The study identified nine frictions that emerged.

annotator_2.text: The findings contribute to exposing a broader generative AI evaluation crisis.

annotator_2.text: The paper offers recommendations for future work and the design of human-centred LLM privacy audits.
